title: poa secunda subsp. juncifolia
intro: Poa secunda subsp. juncifolia, also known as blue grama, is a perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa secunda subsp. juncifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
